title: Hadoop MapReduce Input Format Directory
description: The 'lib/input' directory houses custom input formats for Hadoop MapReduce jobs, facilitating efficient data ingestion. It includes classes like 'CombineSequenceFileInputFormat.java', 'CombineTextInputFormat.java', 'SequenceFileAsBinaryInputFormat.java', 'SequenceFileAsTextInputFormat.java', and 'SequenceFileInputFilter.java'. Each class defines a unique RecordReader, extending existing Hadoop input formats to handle specific file types or filtering requirements. These classes collaborate by extending or implementing Hadoop's RecordReader interface, enabling MapReduce jobs to read diverse data sources seamlessly. This directory exemplifies the Strategy design pattern, where each input format encapsulates a distinct strategy for reading data, promoting flexibility and extensibility in Hadoop's data processing architecture.

raw_response:
TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Input Format Directory

DESCRIPTION:
The 'lib/input' directory houses custom input formats for Hadoop MapReduce jobs, facilitating efficient data ingestion. It includes classes like 'CombineSequenceFileInputFormat.java', 'CombineTextInputFormat.java', 'SequenceFileAsBinaryInputFormat.java', 'SequenceFileAsTextInputFormat.java', and 'SequenceFileInputFilter.java'. Each class defines a unique RecordReader, extending existing Hadoop input formats to handle specific file types or filtering requirements. These classes collaborate by extending or implementing Hadoop's RecordReader interface, enabling MapReduce jobs to read diverse data sources seamlessly. This directory exemplifies the Strategy design pattern, where each input format encapsulates a distinct strategy for reading data, promoting flexibility and extensibility in Hadoop's data processing architecture.
